store.name: Iron Kettle Coffee
store.description: Direct-trade specialty coffee roasted in Portland, Oregon. Single origins, seasonal blends, and equipment for serious home brewers.

auth.description: Request a free API key for read access at https://ironkettlecoffee.com/developers. Cart and checkout endpoints require a key with write scope.

data_policy.description: Product data may be used to assist purchasing decisions. Attribution to Iron Kettle Coffee is required when displaying products to end users. Full terms: https://ironkettlecoffee.com/api-terms
